Klasse SyxChecksum

java.lang.Object
de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxDataStruct
de.btu.kt.syx.midi.SyxChecksum
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
Serializable
public class SyxChecksum extends SyxDataStruct
A system exclusive checksum data struct.
Autor:
Matthias Wolff

  • https://github.com/shingo45endo/sysex-checksum/blob/main/sysex_parser.js

  • Konstruktordetails

    • SyxChecksum

      public SyxChecksum(int nType, int nFirstPart, int nParts)
      Create a new checksum data struct. The checksum will be computed over the data bytes of the message parts specified by nFirstPart and nParts. Checksum parts will be excluded from checksum computation.
      Parameter:
      nType - The check sum type, one of ADD, XOR, ROLAND, or CASIO_VZ
      nFirstPart - Zero-based index of the first message part to include in checksum computation
      nParts - Number of parts to include in checksum computation, -1 to include all parts from nFirstPart to the end of the message

  • Methodendetails

    • getCheckSum

      public byte getCheckSum()
      Returns the checksum stored in this data struct.

    • setCheckSum

      public void setCheckSum(byte cs)
      Sets the checksum stored in this data struct.
      Parameter:
      cs - The checksum

    • computeCheckSum

      public byte computeCheckSum(SyxMessage sxMsg) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Computes the checksum over parts of a system exclusive message.
      Parameter:
      sxMsg - The system exclusive message
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException - if sxMsg is null
      Siehe auch:
      • SyxChecksum(int, int, int)

    • validateCheckSum

      public boolean validateCheckSum(SyxMessage sxMsg) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Validates the checksum of sxMsg. The method compares the checksum stored in this data struct with the checksum computed for sxMsg.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the checksums are equal, false otherwise
      Löst aus:
      IllegalArgumentException

    • computeChecksum

      public static byte computeChecksum(int nType, byte[] data)
      Computes the SysEx checksum for a byte array.
      Parameter:
      nType - The check sum type, one of ADD, XOR, ROLAND, or CASIO_VZ
      data - The byte array
      Gibt zurück:
      The checksum

    • computeChecksumAdd

      public static byte computeChecksumAdd(byte[] data)
      Computes the SysEx checksum for a byte array aggregating by summation.
      Parameter:
      data - The byte array
      Gibt zurück:
      The checksum

    • computeChecksumXor

      public static byte computeChecksumXor(byte[] data)
      Computes the SysEx checksum for a byte array aggregating by XOR.
      Parameter:
      data - The byte array
      Gibt zurück:
      The checksum

    • computeChecksumRoland

      public static byte computeChecksumRoland(byte[] data)
      Computes the SysEx checksum for a byte array aggregating Roland style.
      Parameter:
      data - The byte array
      Gibt zurück:
      The checksum

    • computeChecksumCasioVz

      public static byte computeChecksumCasioVz(byte[] data)
      Computes the SysEx checksum for a byte array aggregating Casio VZ style.
      Parameter:
      data - The byte array
      Gibt zurück:
      The checksum
